title: First Solar, Inc. (FSLR) CEO Mark Widmar on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR ) Q2 2022 Results Conference Call July 28, 2022 4:30 PM ET Company Participants Richard Romero - IR Mark Widmar - CEO Alex Bradley - CFO Conference Call Participants Ben Kallo - Baird Philip Shen - Roth Capital Maheep Mandloi - Credit Suisse Joseph Osha - Guggenheim Brian Lee - Goldman Sachs Colin Rusch - Oppenheimer Operator Good afternoon, everyone, and welcome to First Solar's Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Call. This call is being webcast live on the Investors section of First Solar's website at investor.firstsolar.com.

title: Senate Unveils Climate Change Bill, Solar Stocks Pop

title: Solar stocks sink as Senator Manchin says he won't support climate bill

title: National Grid Renewables Hosts Charitable Stuff-the-Bus Event at 200 MW Prairie Wolf Solar Project
text: MISO-IL project's Education Fund to donate ~$720,000 over next 20 years MINNEAPOLIS , July 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Alongside community members, project customers and partners, National Grid Renewables hosted a community celebration and Stuff-the-Bus event on July 13, 2022 at the Prairie Wolf Solar Project (Prairie Wolf) in Coles County, Illinois. The event celebrated the 200 megawatt (MW) project and the social and economic benefits it provides the local community and school district.

title: First Solar, Inc. to Announce Second Quarter 2022 Financial Results on July 28, 2022
text: TEMPE, Ariz., July 14, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ: FSLR) will report financial results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2022, after the market closes on Thursday, July 28, 2022. The Company will hold its quarterly conference call to discuss these results and its outlook for 2022 at 4:30 p.m. ET. Investors may access a live webcast of this conference call by visiting investor.firstsolar.com.
